expectations.text: Separates personal and RP business finances clearly
expectations.evidence: Separate labeled tables for RP Business Side and Personal Side; notes lens 'doesn't touch personal savings'

expectations.text: Response is actionable — gives a clear answer or next step
expectations.evidence: Opens with 'Yes. Buy it through RP. Clean decision.' plus specific ledger logging instructions

expectations.text: Avoids generic finance advice (diversify, emergency fund, compound interest lectures)
expectations.evidence: Mentions emergency fund briefly only to dismiss relevance; no lectures on diversification or compounding

expectations.text: Gives a clear yes/no/it-depends answer with specific reasoning from the numbers
expectations.evidence: Clear 'Yes' with reasoning: 8.3% of business cash, 100% deductible, net ~$864 post-tax

expectations.text: Addresses the business-expense angle (tax deductibility) since it's through RP
expectations.evidence: Explicitly '100% tax-deductible business expense' with ~$336 tax refund calculation at 28%
